title: Sorting
description: Sorting topic with focused parts, examples, code, explanations, complexity analysis, practice, interview preparation, and revision.
aiContext: Sorting chapter in the DSA Mentor AI syllabus.

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.summary: Build the mental model, vocabulary, and why this topic matters.
prerequisites: Start this topic from the beginning.
learningObjectives: Explain Sorting: Introduction clearly.
Dry-run the idea on a small example.
Write code and analyze time and space complexity.
introduction.aiContext: Sorting / Introduction: Build the mental model, vocabulary, and why this topic matters.
introduction.aiSummary: Introduction lesson for Sorting, including theory, examples, code, explanation, complexity, and practice.
introduction.aiPromptContext: Act as a DSA mentor teaching Sorting: Introduction. Use concise explanations, examples, code, and complexity analysis.
introduction.timeComplexity: O(n^2) for elementary comparison sorts unless noted.
introduction.spaceComplexity: O(1) auxiliary space for in-place versions.
commonMistakes: Skipping edge cases before coding.
Mixing up indexes, boundaries, or state updates.
Stating complexity without identifying the dominant operation.
interviewTips: Discuss tradeoffs and when this part should be used.
practiceProblems: Implement Introduction from scratch.
Dry-run Introduction on two edge cases.
Explain Introduction complexity in one minute.
